g.text: From zero to first sale. One page. One day.
GATE: All 5 accounts created? Next section.
If stuck: Just do Gumroad. That's the only one that makes money today.
Buy it if available, or try behike.store
Point DNS later - skip for now
GATE: Domain bought or skipped? Next section.
If stuck: Skip this entirely. Gumroad doesn't need a domain.
If stuck: Copy the first 3 lines of the description. That's enough.
◆ Your funnel entry point is live
If stuck: Just list 1. One is enough to validate.
Set profile pic (logo or dark minimal)
Bio: "Systems for builders. Made in PR."
Post first image (blueprint on dark bg)
If clear: bookmark TEAS Plus page
If stuck: Just search. Filing can wait a week.
